title: Phonon pair creation by inflating quantum fluctuations in an ion trap

rights.discriminant_action: Tier C summary does not host article text or figures, so hosting is not gated by the publisher audit. APS self-archiving terms are well known informally but have not been formally audited against the site's rights layer; formal audit deferred to annual pass or tier-promotion review. If promotion to Tier B is ever contemplated, this field and the notice_template (aps-accepted-manuscript) must be resolved first.

audit.auditor_note: Tier C summary-first per Phase 1. Trapped-ion analogue of inflationary phonon-pair creation; linked to the Undetected Modes open-research concept note. Phase 2: arXiv preprint 1903.05523 linked (preprint title used 'Particle pair creation by inflation of quantum vacuum fluctuations'; PRL retitled to 'Phonon pair creation...').
